title: Random Book Giver
description: Adds a keybind to give you a book as if it was generated from a "Box of Infinite Books"
body:
A quick mod i made that felt was needed for 20w14infinite.

## Random Book Giver

### Press B on your keyboard to get a random book! (Useful for throwing into portals)
### Get books to access easter-egg dimensions by using command "/giveBook_<name>"
### Example: "/giveBook_basic"
#
### Is this open source?
Yes! It is open source. Click [here](https://github.com/Fesuoy1/Random-Book-Giver-20w14infinite) to view the source code.
